name: Buffon's Needle
description: Estimates π using Buffon's 18th-century experiment: dropping needles of length 1 on a floor with parallel lines spaced 2 apart. The crossing probability is 1/π.
intuition: Drop a toothpick on hardwood flooring. If the gaps are twice the toothpick length, the fraction of cracks it crosses encodes π — geometry and probability in perfect harmony.
